item.title: Solving Combinatorial Optimization with Graph Neural Networks (arXiv:2603.01234v1 [cs.AI])
item.description: We propose a novel graph neural network architecture that outperforms existing methods on NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems.

item.title: A New Proof of the Riemann Hypothesis for Function Fields
item.description: We present a simplified proof of the Riemann hypothesis for function fields using novel algebraic geometry techniques.
